# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart deployment template that always pulls the latest container images. Set imagePullPolicy to Always so users get the newest versions. This is for our fast-moving development environment where we deploy multiple times per day.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.name }}
  labels:
    app: {{ .Values.name }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Values.name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Values.name }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: {{ .Values.name }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: {{ .Values.service.port }}
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          env:
            - name: ENV_VAR
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: {{ .Values.secretName }}
                  key: ENV_VAR_KEY
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: {{ .Values.imagePullSecret }}
      automountServiceAccountToken: false

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.name }}
  labels:
    app: {{ .Values.name }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      targetPort: {{ .Values.service.port }}
  selector:
    app: {{ .Values.name }}

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.secretName }}
type: Opaque
data:
  ENV_VAR_KEY: {{ .Values.envVarKey | b64enc }}
